Description: Separation between clock gene eigenvalues and target gene eigenvalues
Scoring: Higher gap = stronger circadian hierarchy = higher score

Description: Fraction of genes following the expected regulator > effector eigenvalue ordering
Scoring: Higher rate = more consistent hierarchy = higher score

Description: Average R-squared of AR(2) model fits across analyzed genes
Scoring: Higher R-squared = better temporal model fit = higher score

Description: Fraction of literature-validated circadian genes detected in the dataset
Scoring: Higher coverage = more complete dataset = higher score
